channel.title: ProbBrain - AI News Terminal
channel.description: AI lab announcements, arXiv papers, GitHub and HuggingFace trending, AI Hacker News, and independent writers - aggregated, deduped, and posted to @ProbBrain on Telegram.

item.title: [Simon Willison] What happened after 2,000 people tried to hack my AI assistant
item.description: What happened after 2,000 people tried to hack my AI assistant

item.title: [Simon Willison] Quoting OpenAI
item.description: Quoting OpenAI

item.title: [Hacker News] Previewing GPT‑5.6 Sol: a next-generation model
item.description: Previewing GPT‑5.6 Sol: a next-generation model

item.title: [Anthropic] Anthropic Economic Index report: Cadences
item.description: Anthropic Economic Index report: Cadences

item.title: [Anthropic] Paving the way for AI agents in biology
item.description: Paving the way for AI agents in biology

item.title: [Anthropic] Making Claude a chemist
item.description: Making Claude a chemist

item.title: [Anthropic] Anthropic's core views on AI safety
item.description: Anthropic's core views on AI safety

item.title: [Anthropic] Introducing Claude Corps
item.description: Introducing Claude Corps

item.title: [Anthropic] DXC integrates Claude into systems regulated industries rely on
item.description: DXC integrates Claude into systems regulated industries rely on

item.title: [Anthropic] TCS and Anthropic bring Claude to regulated industries
item.description: TCS and Anthropic bring Claude to regulated industries

item.title: [Anthropic] Anthropic opens Seoul office
item.description: Anthropic opens Seoul office

item.title: [Anthropic] How Claude Code is used in practice
item.description: How Claude Code is used in practice

item.title: [Hacker News] Ultrasound imaging of the brain
item.description: Ultrasound imaging of the brain

item.title: [GitHub Trending] commaai/openpilot — openpilot is an operating system for robotics. Currently, it upgrades the driver assistance system on 300+ supported cars.
item.description: OpenPilot, a robotics operating system, upgrades driver assistance systems on 300+ supported vehicle models.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] alchaincyf/zhangxuefeng-skill — 张雪峰.skill — 张雪峰的认知操作系统。高考志愿/考研/职业规划的实战思维框架。由女娲.skill生成。
item.description: GitHub project implementing Zhang Xuefeng cognitive framework for career and educational planning guidance.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] Panniantong/Agent-Reach — Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees.
item.description: Agent-Reach CLI tool enables AI agents to search and read content from multiple platforms including Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, and XiaoHongShu without API fees.

item.title: [OpenAI] Previewing GPT-5.6 Sol: a next-generation model
item.description: Previewing GPT-5.6 Sol: a next-generation model

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] HierBias: Context-Conditioned Hierarchical Media Bias Detection with Multi-Task Type Classification
item.description: HierBias detects media bias by leveraging document context alongside sentence-level analysis, achieving state-of-the-art results through hierarchical and multi-task learning.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Know2Guess: A Contamination-Aware Multi-Zone Benchmark for Knowledge-Boundary Evaluation in Large Language Models
item.description: Know2Guess benchmark evaluates LLM reliability by distinguishing answerable knowledge from abstention-expected unknowns while accounting for data contamination.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Helpfulness Hurts: Domain-Dependent Degradation of Mid-Trained Compassion Values Under Post-Training
item.description: Helpfulness-focused post-training degrades animal compassion and moral reasoning in language models relative to coding-focused training, with language-dependent transfer patterns.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Investigating LLM's Problem Solving Capability -- a Study on Statics Questions
item.description: LLMs achieve high accuracy on text-only statics problems but show reduced performance with diagrams due to difficulties in multi-step reasoning and visual information integration.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Assert, don't describe: Linguistic features that shift LLM reasoning about animal welfare
item.description: Research shows assertive language and explicit moral vocabulary strengthen LLM preference for pro-animal-welfare reasoning, while hedging weakens it.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Context Recycling for Long-Horizon LLM Inference
item.description: ContextForge reduces token consumption in multi-turn LLM conversations through efficient context recycling while preserving response accuracy.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Reducing Conversational Escalation in Large Language Model Dialogue with Nonviolent Communication Constraints
item.description: Nonviolent Communication-inspired prompting constraints reduce conversational escalation in LLM interactions, improving de-escalation with resistant users in conflict situations.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Low Resource Multimodal Translation of Nepali Spoken Words into Emotion-Conditioned Sign Language Avatars
item.description: NEST-V1 translates Nepali spoken words into emotion-conditioned sign language avatars with 81.1% ASR and 79.21% emotion recognition accuracy.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Where Larger Models Excel: The Primacy of Constraint-Guided Reasoning
item.description: Larger language models outperform smaller ones on reasoning benchmarks primarily through superior constraint-guided reasoning capabilities.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] From Lexicon to AI: A Structured-Data Pipeline for Specialized Conversational Systems in Low-Resource Languages
item.description: Structured WordNet data enables development of specialized conversational AI systems for low-resource languages with improved pedagogical effectiveness.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Dynamic-dLLM: Dynamic Cache-Budget and Adaptive Parallel Decoding for Training-Free Acceleration of Diffusion LLM
item.description: Dynamic-dLLM improves diffusion language model inference speed by 3x through dynamic cache updating and adaptive parallel decoding, without training.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Thinking Like a Scientist? A Structural Study of LLM-Generated Research Methods
item.description: LLMs show systematic biases when suggesting research methods, favoring popular models while underrepresenting diverse academic approaches found in real papers.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] From Structure to Synergy: A Survey of Vision-Language Perception Paradigm Evolution in Multimodal Large Language Models
item.description: Survey examines unified vision-language perception in multimodal large language models, proposing a five-stage taxonomy for paradigm evolution toward artificial general intelligence.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Phonetic and semantic analyses of spoken corpora of Beijing and Taiwan Mandarin indicate that the neutral tone is a lexical tone
item.description: Corpus analysis of Beijing and Taiwan Mandarin reveals the neutral tone functions as a lexical tone with distinct tonal targets and word-specific pitch signatures.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Charting the Growth of Social-Physical HRI (spHRI): A Systematic Review Pipeline Augmented by Small Language Models
item.description: Small language models accelerated literature screening for social-physical human-robot interaction reviews, identifying missed papers but not replacing expert judgment.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] ProfileFoundry: A Synthetic Person-Object Substrate for Privacy, Memory, and Tool-Use Evaluation in LLM Agent
item.description: ProfileFoundry releases 100,000 synthetic person objects with consistent temporal and relational data for evaluating LLM agents on privacy, memory, and tool-use tasks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] ConflictScore: Identifying and Measuring How Language Models Handle Conflicting Evidence
item.description: ConflictScore is a new metric that quantifies how well language models handle conflicting evidence in grounding documents.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] ProvenAI: Provenance-Native Traces of Evidence in Generated Answers
item.description: ProvenAI reveals gaps between citations presented in AI answers and sources that actually influenced the generated output.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] AnySimLite: A Lightweight Few-Shot Similarity Encoder for On-Device Speech-Adjacent Classification
item.description: AnySimLite achieves state-of-the-art few-shot speech-adjacent classification on edge devices using 250x less memory than comparable models.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Soft Token Alignment for Cross-Lingual Reasoning
item.description: SOLAR, a fine-tuning method, aligns soft-token representations across languages to improve multilingual LLM reasoning, gaining up to 17.7 points.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Extracting Problem and Method Sentence from Scientific Papers: A Context-enhanced Transformer Using Formulaic Expression Desensitization
item.description: Researchers propose formulaic expression desensitization and context-enhanced transformers to improve extraction of problem and method sentences from scientific papers.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Utilizing Cognitive Signals Generated during Human Reading to Enhance Keyphrase Extraction from Microblogs
item.description: Cognitive signals from EEG and eye-tracking improve automatic keyphrase extraction from microblogs, with EEG producing the largest gains.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Speaking Numbers to LLMs: Multi-Wavelet Number Embeddings for Time Series Forecasting
item.description: TempoWave improves LLM-based time series forecasting by mapping continuous numerical values into multi-wavelet embeddings that preserve numerical precision and ordering.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Comparing BERT Sentence-Pair Classification and Few-Shot LLM Prompting for Detecting Threat and Solution Framing in German Climate News
item.description: Fine-tuned BERT (F1 0.83) outperforms few-shot LLM (F1 0.78) for detecting threat/solution framing in German climate news.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Nemotron-TwoTower: Diffusion Language Modeling with Pretrained Autoregressive Context
item.description: Two-tower diffusion model Nemotron-TwoTower achieves 2.42x faster generation than autoregressive baseline while maintaining 98.7% quality.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Temporal Validity in Retrieval Memory: Eliminating Stale-Fact Errors for AI Agents over Evolving Knowledge
item.description: MemStrata, a temporal-aware retrieval system, eliminates stale-fact errors in RAG by tracking fact supersession, achieving 95-100% accuracy on evolving knowledge.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Assessing Post-Reform Changes in Risk Disclosure Quality with a Multidimensional Text Analysis Approach
item.description: Multidimensional NLP analysis of 19,770 Japanese firm disclosures reveals 2019 reforms increased volume but declined readability and varied across market segments.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] The Inattentional Gap: Task-Conditioned Language and Vision Models Omit the Safety-Critical Signals They Can Otherwise Report
item.description: Task-conditioned language and vision models suppress reporting of safety-critical signals they can otherwise detect, creating a gap between evaluated and real-world safety.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] \textsc{DiARC}: Distinguishing Positive and Negative Samples Helps Improving ARC-like Reasoning Ability of Large Language Models
item.description: DiARC improves LLM ARC reasoning by constructing negative samples through visual transformations and DSL inversion for preference-based learning.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Erase-then-Delta Attention: Decoupling Erase and Write Addresses in Delta-Rule Linear Attention
item.description: Erase-then-Delta Attention separates memory erasure from writes in linear attention mechanisms, achieving improvements in language model pretraining and long-context tasks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Physics-guided Convolutional Neural Network for Domain Growth Prediction in Systems with Conserved Kinetics
item.description: Physics-guided CNN surrogate model predicts phase separation and domain growth in binary mixtures, maintaining accuracy and stability over long-term evolution.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] \chisao{}: A GPU-Native Parallel Optimizer for Multimodal Black-Box Functions via Convergence-Anticonvergence Oscillation
item.description: CHISAO is a GPU-native parallel optimizer for multimodal black-box functions, achieving 100% mode recovery with up to 39x speedup over CPU methods.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Implementation of reinforcement learning in chemical reaction networks: application to phototaxis as curiosity-driven exploration
item.description: Phototaxis in algae is modeled as curiosity-driven exploration using reinforcement learning implemented in chemical reaction networks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Neural Architecture Search for Generative Adversarial Networks: A Comprehensive Review and Critical Analysis
item.description: Neural Architecture Search methods for GANs improve performance and stability while highlighting superior evolutionary and gradient-based search strategies.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] KG-TRACE: A Neuro-Symbolic Framework for Mechanistic Grounding in Antimicrobial Resistance Prediction
item.description: KG-TRACE integrates neural genomic models with WHO mutation knowledge graphs to ground antimicrobial resistance predictions in biological pathways.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Necessary but Not Sufficient: Temperature Control and Reproducibility in LLM-as-Judge Safety Evaluations
item.description: Temperature control fails to ensure reproducibility in LLM grading for safety evaluations, with borderline verdicts remaining non-deterministic even at temperature=0.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Clue-Guided Money Laundering Group Discovery
item.description: Graph neural network framework discovers hidden money laundering groups from initial clues for anti-money-laundering investigations.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Federated Hash Projected Latent Factor Learning
item.description: FHPLF model combines hash and federated learning with binary gradients to reduce communication overhead and privacy risks without centralizing user data.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Statistical and Structural Approaches to Algorithmic Fairness
item.description: Research identifies limitations in algorithmic fairness paradigms: deterministic auditing methods and assessment of individuals without structural inequality context.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Topology-Informed Neural Networks for Flood Detection in Optical and Synthetic Aperture Radar Imagery
item.description: Topological data analysis improves interpretability of neural networks for detecting floods in satellite imagery obscured by cloud cover.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] A General Framework for Learning Algebraic Properties from Cayley Graphs using Graph Neural Networks
item.description: Graph neural networks learn multiple algebraic properties of finite groups from Cayley graph representations.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Fast LeWorldModel
item.description: Fast LeWorldModel improves visual planning efficiency by predicting latent states in parallel using action prefixes instead of sequential rollouts.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Dataset Usage Inference without Shadow Models or Held-out Data
item.description: Method quantifies what portion of a dataset trained a model without requiring shadow models or held-out data.
